normal: I'm so sorry [TARGET] for the late reply, I've been in back-to-back meetings all day and left my phone on my desk.

Sorry [TARGET], I'm accompanying my parents at the hospital and have been totally focused on taking care of them.
Sorry [TARGET], my data plan ran out this morning and I just managed to find Wi-Fi now.
Hello [TARGET], I've been busy cooking a huge meal for a family gathering, my hands were dirty and wet.

Sorry [TARGET], my right thumb is severely sprained from playing fighting games, I have to type very slowly with my pinky.
